toolRoundLimit.title: Tool Call Round Limit
toolRoundLimit.description: Detect consecutive AI tool call rounds (assistant → tool_use → user → tool_result counts as one round). Automatically injects a prompt after 5 rounds to prevent infinite loops.

toolCallLoop.title: Tool Call Loop Detection
toolCallLoop.description: Detect repeated calls to the same tool by the model. Automatically interrupts the request or injects a prompt when the threshold is exceeded.

streamLoop.title: SSE Output Loop Detection
streamLoop.description: Detect content repetition loops in streaming output (N-gram pattern). Automatically interrupts the stream when the threshold is exceeded.

toolErrorLogging.title: Tool Error Logging
toolErrorLogging.description: Record detailed information about Claude Code / pi tool call failures (including tool_use input, error content, provider, model). Used for analyzing patterns of model-generated incorrect tool_use parameters.

tokenEstimation.claudeCode: Claude Code: sends x-claude-code-session-id automatically, no extra config needed
tokenEstimation.piExtension:
Pi: install extension at ~/.pi/agent/extensions/llm-router-session/
(generates a UUID on session_start and injects x-pi-session-id header)
tokenEstimation.piModelsJson:
Pi: add headers to your provider config in models.json:
"headers": { "x-client-type": "pi-coding-agent" }
tokenEstimation.desc: Only applies to requests with a session_id. Requests without a session_id will not participate in cache hit rate calculation.
